name: bilibili-source
description: Fetch comprehensive, login-free data for any Bilibili (B站) video — title, UP name and follower count, publish date, partition, tags, per-part cids, live stats (view, like, coin, favorite, share, reply, danmaku), and full danmaku (bullet-comment) text. Use this skill whenever working with a Bilibili video and needing real, citable numbers or metadata — ingesting a Bilibili source into a knowledge base, analyzing why a video performed, verifying a creator's claimed metrics, building a case study,
author: daymade
